$comment: `taplo` and the corresponding VS Code plugins only support version draft-04 of JSON Schema, see <https://taplo.tamasfe.dev/configuration/developing-schemas.html>. draft-07 is mostly compatible with it, newer versions may not be.
title: PHPantom Configuration
description: User configuration schema for .phpantom.toml: per-project settings for the PHPantom PHP language server.

version.description: Override the detected PHP version (e.g. "8.3"). When unset, PHPantom infers from composer.json's platform or require.php.

unresolved-member-access.description: Report member access (->, ?->, ::) on subjects whose type could not be resolved. Useful for discovering gaps in type coverage but produces too many diagnostics on codebases without comprehensive type annotations.

extra-arguments.description: Report calls that pass more arguments than the function accepts. PHP silently ignores extra arguments to user-defined functions, and many libraries exploit this for flexible APIs.

indexing.description: Controls how PHPantom discovers classes across the workspace.

strategy.description: The indexing strategy for class discovery. "composer" (default): use Composer's classmap, fall back to self-scan. "self": scan all PHP files, ignore classmap. "full": background-parse all files (not yet implemented). "none": no proactive scanning, classmap only.

formatting.description: Controls the formatting strategy. PHPantom ships a built-in formatter (PER-CS 2.0 style). Projects with php-cs-fixer or PHP_CodeSniffer in composer.json require-dev automatically use those tools instead. Explicit configuration here always takes priority.

php-cs-fixer.description: Command or path to run php-cs-fixer. Unset: auto-detect from composer.json require-dev. Empty string: disable php-cs-fixer. Any other value: use as the command.

phpcbf.description: Command or path to run phpcbf. Unset: auto-detect from composer.json require-dev. Empty string: disable phpcbf. Any other value: use as the command.

timeout.description: Maximum runtime in milliseconds per external formatting tool before it is killed. Applied per tool, not for the combined pipeline.

phpstan.description: PHPStan proxy settings. PHPantom can run PHPStan in editor mode on each file save and surface its errors as LSP diagnostics.

command.description: Command or path to run PHPStan. Unset: auto-detect via vendor/bin/phpstan then $PATH. Empty string: disable PHPStan integration. Any other value: use as the command.

memory-limit.description: Memory limit passed to PHPStan via --memory-limit.

timeout.description: Maximum runtime in milliseconds before PHPStan is killed.
